content:
# Recommendations тАФ after iter-024 review

## 1. (TOP PRIORITY) Execute the generic-`M` close of B6-succ `tensorPowAdd_assoc` тАФ then HARD-GATE
The blocker is now fully diagnosed and the close path is concrete and same-file-precedented. iter-025
should:
1. **effort-breaker / scaffolder:** extract a generic monoidal lemma
   `tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core {M : Type*} [Category M] [MonoidalCategory M] тАж` stating the
   fully-canonical hom equation the banked reduction lands on (takes the `tensorObjIso` bridges as iso
   args, the four `tensorPowAdd` homs as morphism args, `ihRh` as the fold hypothesis). In generic `M`
   there is ONE category instance, so `simp only [Category.assoc, Iso.hom_inv_id_assoc,
   whisker_exchange_assoc, associator_naturality_*]` + `rw [foldhyp]` + `monoidal` all fire.
2. **prover:** close B6-succ by `exact tensorPowAdd_assoc_succ_core тАж ihRh` (its `isDefEq` bridges the
   rfl-defeq comp-instance diamond that `rw`/`simp`/`erw` cannot). NB first unfold the RHS atom
   `╬╝_{m,m'+(c+1)}` via `tensorPowAdd_succ` (force `m'+(c+1) тд│ (m'+c)+1` with `simp only [Nat.add_succ]`
   or `conv`/`change`) to expose the `ihRh` RHS atom.
   Precedent: `tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf` (this file, ~L2530-2640) crossed THIS SAME diamond by
   exactly this generic-`M` + `exact` move.
3. **Pre-commit a HARD GATE:** the generic-`M` `exact` is the last untried mechanical variant; the math
   is settled (lvbc: faithful, un-weakened). If B6-succ still does not close in iter-025, escalate to
   USER (do NOT open another unconstrained helper round тАФ plateau would be 9 iters). This mirrors the
   iter-022 gate that the iter-023 refactor legitimately overrode; there is no further structural
   refactor available here (the refactor already happened), so the escalation is the correct next step.

## 2. Blueprint hygiene тАФ `canonical_runit_core` block (major, lvbc)
The Lean decl `canonical_runit_core` was DELETED this iter (folded into the `rfl` base of the 2nd-index
`tensorPowAdd`). Review already **neutralized the dangling `\lean{}` pin** (commented out
Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex:1080). Remaining (route to a blueprint-writer, NOT must-fix тАФ build is
green and the `\label` still resolves the 2 prose `\cref`s):
- Rewrite the stale prose L1067-1073 тАФ it still says the right-unit constraint "collapses to a single
  canonical core identity (`\cref{lem:canonical_runit_core}`)", which contradicts the now-`rfl`
  `tensorPowAdd_zero_right`. Either delete the `lem:canonical_runit_core` block (L1076-1109) and reword,
  or keep it as an explicitly-informal historical remark.

## 3. Lean docstring fix (minor, lvbc) тАФ prover lane
`SectionGradedRing.lean:3068` тАФ `tensorPowAdd_assoc` docstring header says "induction on `m`"; the proof
inducts on the LAST index `m''` (the inline comment L3079 and the blueprint already say `m''`). One-word
fix; bundle into the iter-025 prover round.

## 4. Blueprint `% NOTE:` on the B6-succ obstacle (minor, lvbc) тАФ blueprint-writer lane
`lem:tensorPowAdd_assoc`'s proof sketch is mathematically adequate but omits the comp-instance-diamond
formalization blocker. Add a `% NOTE:` recording: the succ fold junction `tR.hom тЙл tR.inv` mixes native
vs `LocalizedMonoidal` comp; discharge via generic-`M` abstraction + `exact` (precedent
`tensorObjAssoc_eta_factor_sheaf`). Saves the next prover the re-diagnosis.

## 5. DURABLE FIX (sync-side) тАФ sync_leanok over-strip + corruption, 11th identical occurrence
Every iter since ~iter-013 the `sync_leanok` phase blanket-removes ALL proof-block `\leanok` on
`Picard_SectionGradedRing.tex` (this iter: removed 26, added 0) AND has corrupted a `\uses`-bearing
opener (this iter: ate `\leanok\uses{` @965 тЖТ bare labels + dangling `}`). Review manually restores
~23-26 markers + repairs the corruption EVERY iter тАФ pure treading water. **The durable fix is sync-side**
(the heartbeat-glitch false-negative on this large chapter must stop blanket-stripping, and the opener
corruption is a parser bug). Logged to TO_USER.md across 11 iters. Until fixed, each review must
re-restore via the exclusion principle (green build + only-N-sorries identifies the closed set).

## 6. Out-of-cone merge-back artifacts (deferred, unchanged)
blueprint-doctor flags broken `\ref`/`\cref`/`\uses` in DEFERRED chapters (Cohomology_FlatBaseChange,
Picard_GlueDescent, Picard_QuotScheme) + `% archon:covers` pointing at 2 non-existent
`AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/FlatBaseChange*.lean`. These are extraction artifacts outside the 3-seed
cone тАФ resolve at merge-back, not now. Do NOT edit (per standing merge-back directive).
